110001 · Minor Ruby

Minor Ruby is a Common Decoration material. Use this page for ID, icon, stat group and related materials.

RarityCommon

Drop Finder

Where to farm

Chests that can contain this material and the stages that likely drop them. Sources are inferred from box level and stage — treat them as a guide and confirm rare drops in-game.

Stage Boss Box 7 0.9% to contain
Normal Monster Box Lv15 0.8% to contain

Normal Monster Box 3 0.7% to contain

Act Boss Box 1 0.7% to contain

1110

Material effects

Applied through Cube Decoration — grants one preset stat per gear slot at 100% pick chance, scaled by the material's tier.

Weapon

Fire Damage Percent +20~30% T2

Armor

Fire Resistance +5~10% T1

Accessory

Attack Damage +1~2 T1
